page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.16xlarge is a storage and memory-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 64 dedicated physical cores using the x86_64 architecture, powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance features a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated physical CPU allocation without hyperthreading.

This instance is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. A key feature of the ecs.i4.16xlarge is its bundled local storage, which consists of 15358 GB of SSD capacity. This high-capacity local solid-state storage is designed to support data-intensive operations directly on the physical host.

For network connectivity, the instance offers a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given the combination of 64 dedicated cores, 512.0 GB of RAM, and over 15 TB of local SSD storage, this server is designed for large-scale databases, high-throughput storage applications, and memory-intensive transactional workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.16xlarge is a storage-optimized and memory-optimized server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz with an x86_64 architecture. The instance provides 512.0 GB of RAM, translating to 8.0 GB of memory per core, and includes 15358 GB of local SSD storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation, high memory capacity, and substantial local solid-state storage, this instance is designed for demanding workloads such as large-scale databases, transactional systems, and storage-heavy applications requiring high-throughput local I/O.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.16xlarge is a storage-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, 15358 GB of local SSD storage, and 50 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, 15.3 TB local SSD storage, and 50 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated 64-core x86_64 server featuring 512 GB of RAM and over 15 TB of high-speed local SSD storage.

512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
15358 GB of bundled local SSD storage
Optimized for large-scale databases and high-throughput storage workloads
